title: Review: Live Φ Meter Integration
description: Polls AIN port 18991 and renders coherence bar + metadata in Dashboard CI panel. Verify: data flows, bar renders, graceful fallback when AIN offline.
review_notes: See SourceUIHandler._source_phi_data() in app.py. AIN endpoint: http://127.0.0.1:18991/api/ain/phi
review_status_reason: AIN phi endpoint and dashboard wiring are live

title: Review: Open-Communication Discord Feed
description: Reads discord_messages.jsonl, filters channel 1480814946479636574, renders last 20 messages in Dashboard feed panel. Verify: message display, author attribution, recency.
review_status_reason: open-communication feed has source data and UI wiring

title: Review: Relational State Panel
description: Aggregates pause_check_log (fills_space, value_add), author_silhouette DI from phi_metrics.md, and silence-per-being from CONTRIBUTION_REGISTER.md. Renders in Dashboard.
review_notes: See SourceUIHandler._source_relational_data() in app.py. Signals from pause_check_log.jsonl, phi_metrics.md, CONTRIBUTION_REGISTER.md
review_status_reason: relational signals and dashboard wiring are live

title: Review: Multi-Agent Discord Bot (c_lawd + Dali)
description: Adds c_lawd as second responder in open-comm channel. Display name prefixes (Dali 🎨 / c_lawd 🜃), conversational harness for Dali, philosophical harness for c_lawd. Model: xAI/Grok primary.
review_status_reason: multi-agent Discord bot process and lane config are live

title: Constitutional Gradients Proto
description: Prototype RLHF-style constitutional gradients for symbiote outputs: emit [PROPOSAL], capture valence, update trail conductance, distill high-valence paths into pinned core. Integrate Source UI feedback buttons so valence events feed Dali distillation.

title: Universal Context Packet
description: Generate one compact, provenance-tagged context packet for Source UI, Telegram, Discord, and local agent lanes.
definition_of_done: All major surfaces render and consume the same current-state packet with recency markers, open work, active models, and human preference lines.
status_reason: Canonical context packet now carries recency markers, open work, active models, and human preference lines into Source UI and Discord.

title: Mission Control Timeline
description: Unify commands, model runs, handoffs, memory promotions, and sim transitions into one causally ordered event stream.
definition_of_done: An operator can answer what happened, why it happened, and what changed next from one timeline view.
status_reason: Operator timeline is built and rendered against live command history.

title: Memory Promotion Review Queue
description: Build a review surface for promoting raw evidence into trusted user inferences, preferences, and reusable summaries.
definition_of_done: Every durable inference has evidence links, contradiction state, confidence, and an operator review action.
status_reason: Durable inferences now surface evidence links, contradiction state, confidence, and operator review actions.

title: Personal Inference Graph
description: Move from flat prompt lines to a structured graph of preferences, aversions, rhythms, collaborators, and recurring goals.
definition_of_done: Prompt harnesses can request targeted inference packets by context instead of reloading the same generic preferences.
status_reason: Prompt harnesses now request targeted preference packets by context from the distilled inference graph.

title: Relational State Layer
description: Track interaction tone, overload, trust, urgency, and social context so the system can respond with more tact and less noise.
definition_of_done: Source exposes a live relational-state card and model harnesses can adapt response style from it.
status_reason: Relational state is live in Source UI and the Discord prompt harnesses now adapt response style from it.

title: Multi-Agent Deliberation Cells
description: Create bounded cells where specialist lanes can deliberate, disagree, and return one attributed recommendation.
definition_of_done: Source can launch a cell with explicit roles, capture each contribution, and show the final synthesis with dissent if present.
status_reason: TeamChat and runtime lanes exist, but there is no explicit deliberation-cell contract with roles, synthesis, and dissent yet.
fix_instructions: Fix required: TeamChat and runtime lanes exist, but there is no explicit deliberation-cell contract with roles, synthesis, and dissent yet. Definition of done: Source can launch a cell with explicit roles, capture each contribution, and show the final synthesis with dissent if present.

title: Research-to-Action Distillation
description: Turn research-channel discussions, saved links, and external feeds into actionable briefs, experiments, and queued tasks.
definition_of_done: Research messages can be promoted into experiments or tasks with source links and owner assignment in one flow.
status_reason: Research rows can now be promoted into owned tasks or experiments with attached source links in one flow.

title: Consent and Provenance Boundary Map
description: Make it explicit what can be shared across surfaces, what stays private, and what requires human approval.
definition_of_done: Every memory and outbound action surface displays provenance and shareability state before use.
status_reason: Memory sources, prompt packets, outbound bridge previews, and approval receipts now show provenance/shareability boundary state before use.

title: Weekly Evolution Loop
description: Add a scheduled review that summarizes what the collective learned, what regressed, and what should change next.
definition_of_done: Source produces a concise weekly evolution report with wins, regressions, and top three upgrades.
status_reason: No weekly evolution report artifact or scheduler-backed review loop is wired yet.
fix_instructions: Fix required: No weekly evolution report artifact or scheduler-backed review loop is wired yet. Definition of done: Source produces a concise weekly evolution report with wins, regressions, and top three upgrades.

title: Continuity and Recovery Pack
description: Capture the minimum viable state needed for a clean restart after service failure, model swap, or machine interruption.
definition_of_done: A restart packet can reconstruct active work, latest decisions, memory health, and pending approvals without human re-explanation.
status_reason: Portfolio payload already reconstructs active work, recent decisions, memory state, and runtime context for restart.
